title: NASCON attributes 100% growth in dividend payout, higher profitability to massive expansion drive - FinancialEDGE
description: The Management of NASCON Allied Industries Plc, has attributed significant growth in the dividend payout by 100 per cent to N2 per share and the company’s impressive run during the year, ending December 31, 2024, to the successful expansion of its market base. The aggressive expansion, according to the management, led to a significant increase
html: The Management of NASCON Allied Industries Plc, has attributed significant growth in the dividend payout by 100 per cent to N2 per share and the company’s impressive run during the year, ending December 31, 2024, to the successful expansion of its market base.
